payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Awesome. Next up. Reminder guys who have Amazon Prime, with Twitch Prime, you can actually subscribe to a Twitch channel for free. One a month with your Amazon Prime account. If you have it, connect it to your Twitch account and you can subscribe to Geek & Sundry or any other Twitch channel you are a fan of, for free.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god! If they don't make that they're fools!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was magic!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to see that!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're going to make that right? We're going to make that now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are moments like this that it makes me a little sad that you're no longer a bard. At least we keep the Scanlan alive with shit like this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Tell me you were singing that in your car on the way home from work.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can see action figures busting through walls being held by hands (explosion sound effects).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was awesome. Thank you, Sam.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You had to imagine the synths.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, we were there. Thank you D&D Beyond for allowing that to happen as well as being a helpful tool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Les Mis was a stepping stone for that moment.

payload.raw_text: You watch as four of them rush into the other exit. There's an exit to the left and an exit to the right. They exit the room to the right and then there's three left: two regular--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Given this, you guys are deciding what to do. There's, in a brief moment of quiet, a loud boom that shakes the interior of the chamber. You watch as both the hyenas (squeal) look up, scared. The two gnolls immediately look about. Dust and rocks begin to settle and fall from the ceiling as it shakes and then comes to rest. A moment later, a cloud of dust and smoke comes billowing out this side of the chamber where the four gnolls had run previously. Then the rumbling settles. The gnolls themselves are spooked. Then, distracted from the child at the moment, both peeking over, the undead gnoll stands there glancing about, seeming unaffected by the current scenario. Passive perception, the highest on this would be Beauregard, Caleb, Molly, and Jester, I believe. Actually, Caleb and Beauregard would not, because they don't see anything. You guys hear sounds, and you're waiting for any inclination of light to kick in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Look at that opening, it's so cool looking!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where are we?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are entering from this side.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh that's a little door? That's the door you we're talking about?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's too many options!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Essentially, over here-- You can place yourselves as you feel necessary. Off to this side, in whichever marching order you prefer.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will be at the rear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I figured as much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How old is the child that got pulled out of the room?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At first glance, it's hard to see, especially for those of you who are keeping their light low, because there is no light source in the chamber. Those with dark vision will be making out most of the details here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll be up front. I can do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that would put Fjord up at the front.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll be behind Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can't see shit.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (snarl) Another moment passes, and the gnolls relax. You watch as the immediate dread of the recent explosion sound, the shocking and rocking of the room, seems to have passed over them. They both go back to paying attention to their recent vicinity, which includes the small child, which is still quietly sobbing in the painful grasp of this large curled gnoll hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What do we see, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys see the faint appearance of some sort of a flying creature, very small, emerge from the tunnel that had recently expelled all this dust and smoke.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin size or smaller?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin size. (humming) It hovers in the air in a few places, and then locks itself over here onto this far wall, on a higher perch.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fucking bugs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you see that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think I saw that. Did you see that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I saw that.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The ones who can see in the dark right now, which would be the four of you, you guys get a round of attack on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: On the count of three?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are we just going to attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We should distract them--!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Radiant blast!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sacred Flame, I mean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The ones who are making the initial strike on this--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I could distract them or something first!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Eldritch Blast for me, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will also do that as well, following suit with everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are things happening?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't hit the kid!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can't see! Do you have your lights?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, you don't see anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Where you're currently positioned, I would like you all to roll initiative before we get to your round, just so we have it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What do we see, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys see the faint appearance of some sort of a flying creature, very small, emerge from the tunnel that had recently expelled all this dust and smoke.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin size or smaller?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin size. (humming) It hovers in the air in a few places, and then locks itself over here onto this far wall, on a higher perch.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fucking bugs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you see that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think I saw that. Did you see that?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I saw that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (snarl) Another moment passes, and the gnolls relax. You watch as the immediate dread of the recent explosion sound, the shocking and rocking of the room, seems to have passed over them. They both go back to paying attention to their recent vicinity, which includes the small child, which is still quietly sobbing in the painful grasp of this large curled gnoll hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: On the count of three?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are we just going to attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We should distract them--!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Radiant blast!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sacred Flame, I mean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The ones who are making the initial strike on this--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I could distract them or something first!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Eldritch Blast for me, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will also do that as well, following suit with everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, are things happening?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't hit the kid!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can't see! Do you have your lights?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, you don't see anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The ones who can see in the dark right now, which would be the four of you, you guys get a round of attack on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: If I can have you roll initiative when you get settled in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (rasping) Next time I'm going to really hurt you! I said that in Infernal.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Which one of them is the undead looking gnoll?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That guy. I would like to aim at the dude on the right, the one closest to you, and I will carry over my Hex that is still up since it lasts an hour, so for my bonus action I will cast Hex on that motherfuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I would like to use Eldritch Blast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Roll for the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Plus six, that's a 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that hits. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice. This is a 1d10 plus four. That's 11 plus five points of necrotic damage for 16 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 points of damage, all right. As it's standing on this upper portion of the rock floor, it glances back as you guys enter. You guys see a flash of light from the arcing of the arcane energy as it streaks across and slams into its body just in time to see another shadowed shape emerging out of this tunnel to join the fray. As it falls back (snarling, chattering). That's going to end the initial round of combat. Now we're into the initiative order. At the top of this, you guys glance over and the four of you, at least, see this shape begin to emerge from around the wall. You see this tall, spindly humanoid figure that begins to curve around the side. Khary, if you want to join the table. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Spindly, what?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It looks to be a young boy, probably between six and eight years old. You're not quite sure of the age.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll have to move. I'll lean around to get around that stalagtite.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Around here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, just so I can get an eyeline on the one I already shot once.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Back over here?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Anywhere. I'm going to move right back in a second. I'll lean around, reload. Oh, god! Fire again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I get sneak attack? No, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, because you're not hidden.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Shitballs. 20 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20 hits. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight points of damage. That'll do it, actually. As it's holding the child and lifting it up by the arm in the air, it looks like it's ready to run away and grab it with it. As it turns to flee, you catch it in the base of the skull and it falls to the ground. The child falls prone onto the floor next to the now lifeless gnoll body.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What does the child look like? He or she? It's a boy?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's right, I forgot to put the undead guy on the initiative order which he would have gotten a round. We'll say you and him go simultaneously at this point since you engaged him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's enough to do it. As you kick, the hyena gets launched and arc through the air, slamming into this table which busts it up against the wall onto its side and you can't even see the lifeless body of the hyena. It's currently buried beneath the overturned table. That's your first--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a bonus action to use my med kit on the kid? My healer's kit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's an action to use a healer's kit, unfortunately. You still have some movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll just move over to the kid and hold the wound.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Stem the flow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you get down with Nott at this point and you're trying to think of some way to apply pressure to prevent the bleeding. Okay, that ends your turn. That brings us to Molly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm taking a roll at the big guy. First strike.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A moment passes. There's no response, but you hear the faint sniffing and whimpering of somebody on the other side.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shaft.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Yes, the shaft. That's a good way of putting it. That boom you may have heard happened to come from me, so we've got a little bit less to have to deal with. This, I really don't know what's going on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, speaking of, I stand up and I walk to the door where the little kid was pulled from.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, Nott, do you want to let her take a look at it? In case it could blow up on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've seen their traps. I know their methods!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are there any ropes across the door?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let me look! Are there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Five. Plus five is ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Best you can tell, it doesn't appear to be trapped. It does have a simple latch that is only accessible from the outer side, but it is not locked.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I knock on the door. Housekeeping! Is anybody locked in here?

payload.raw_text: Okay. You guys carefully make your way back up through, trying not to drag the bodies over heavy bumps or rocks, eventually making your way out of the main entrance way. You notice a trap that you had deftly avoided multiple times getting people in and out, of a large tree trunk that had been suspended in the roof to swing down when triggered, had been triggered and is now hanging there. Apparently somebody made an unfortunate mistake making their way through. You all eventually find your way out into the daylight once more. The woman, who's now introduced herself as Herma, and the older half-elf man, Petrov, all step out into the light, blinking, bleary in the sudden influx of light. As soon as you make it into the open sky, you can see this breath of relief wash over both of them, and the young boy is now starting to come to consciousness again. Goes, "Mom?" She goes, "Shh! It's okay; it's okay." She looks up over towards Shakäste, and has more tears in her eyes, and goes, "Thank you."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I will go ahead of the party to run point.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Make a perception check for me.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. A minute passes. Two minutes. You don't see any indication that anything noticed or heard.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you see any survivors?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Not yet, but there are two sentinels and they are guarding something. I'm hoping that's someone.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Perhaps we can create a little bit of a lure to bring back that single fellow closer to us and we dispatch him quietly.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: It's not a bad idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I reached into the ball bearings that I have left since I have about half. I take one and go-- (ball bearing bouncing)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Down along to the grade? (ball bearing bouncing) Eventually, you can no longer hear any noise the ball bearing makes as it continues out of your earshot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm also going with the Dancing Lights. They're not leading the way. The closest one is actually ten feet behind us like a choo-choo train back behind the group so that it's dim light 20 to 30 feet ahead of us.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Since you guys hadn't left before.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, sure, I feel inspired again. I'll take a swig.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do take a heavy swig off of your flask, thank you. Both wait carefully holding your action until underneath you can see what emerges below the lowest part of the curving tunnel roof, a gnoll snout begins to protrude past. You can see the arrow already nocked in the longbow as it turns down and turns and glances up the tunnel to meet your guys' vision.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: As soon as he fires, I will as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will fire, my hand-- how far?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right now he's about 30 feet below you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I can make that shot. (ping!) (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and roll an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh dear.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just hits. Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 15 is the magic number.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I say my bonus I move my Hex over to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, your Hex has faded.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, had you guys taken a short rest when you were up there or not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do take a heavy swig off of your flask, thank you. Both wait carefully holding your action until underneath you can see what emerges below the lowest part of the curving tunnel roof, a gnoll snout begins to protrude past. You can see the arrow already nocked in the longbow as it turns down and turns and glances up the tunnel to meet your guys' vision.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I can make that shot. (ping!) (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh dear.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just hits. Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 15 is the magic number.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I say my bonus I move my Hex over to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, your Hex has faded.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Since you guys hadn't left before.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I tried it. 20 up, 20 down that side.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, so before we jump into this, we'll say you took the short rest, which is an hour, so you guys can use your hit dice. You hadn't taken any damage, Shakäste, so you don't have to worry about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and roll an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh dear.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just hits. Misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 15 is the magic number.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I say my bonus I move my Hex over to him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, your Hex has faded.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Since you guys hadn't left before.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I tried it. 20 up, 20 down that side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, had you guys taken a short rest when you were up there or not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I was hoping so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we did say we were going to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Then it would add another hour up there, wouldn't it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It would. It's up to you guys. It may or may not affect things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't really get anything back on short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I would get my ki point back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would get a spell back, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I think we should. We rescued the survivors, we gave them a little moment to grieve.

preceding_turns.text: Let's see. Actually, I feel pretty good right behind these fellows.

preceding_turns.text: All right, so you stay there. That ends your turn. The gnolls will now go. The three of them are going to begin to back away, and they're all going to take strikes with their bow.

preceding_turns.text: Ranged attackers.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.text: Sounds great. Yeah.

preceding_turns.text: It was a three and a two, with disadvantage, so no, it misses you entirely. It actually gets partially caught in the 'fro, and makes its way to the back.

preceding_turns.text: That's your action. That's your go?

preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and then can I use my movement to crouch behind this table?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

payload.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He fucking studied up!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There, it's already at 30, so 31?? Sweet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, as you feel this sudden burst of physical hardiness surge within, this warm glow in your belly that helps stir you up to the future of physical impact and damage. That's your action; do you want to move at all on your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Sure. You know what? I think I'll move up a few feet, and I'll also take Anastasia and put her a little further forward, but at a safe distance from these people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Like this direction, or this direction?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Actually, yeah, closer to me. Yeah, there we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: I like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.text: Nice. That plus six, that's eight points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight points of damage. That one, as it's notching another arrow into its bow it takes the impact off of its shoulder. It grazed it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: With my bonus action, can I cast Hexblade's Curse on the big motherfucker and say: Come on, you sack of shit, come get me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You may. We'll mark him with the Hexblade Curse with this big old angry black circle to mark him as the target there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You may.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Come get me, you coward!

payload.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pole vaulting off, parkouring up the wall until eventually you leap and get back up to the top.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did you guys know there's a hole?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I did not know that. Did not know that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We did not.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Now I climbed out of the hole to two gnolls. Hole to gnoll?

preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thunder.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That hits. That is a 20 to hit.

preceding_turns.text: Yeah. This is thunder damage is a total of... oh, just eight, you know. Just eight points of thunder damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eight points of damage. It impacts and it looks like really hurt now and it's like (heavy breathing). It's getting ready to run. It looks like it's in the process of deciding to flee.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. This looks good. I'm going to back down the stairs and stand by Shakäste, I think. Diplomatic immunity! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Finishing Caleb's turn, Fjord, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I use my full movement to come back up the stairs as far as I can? 30 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Eldritch Blast into the darker gnoll. Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Roll to attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Plus six. That is 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.text: All right. That is (counting) 15 points of Eldritch Blast damage.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's like-- Let me look at how much a glaive weighs according to the book. The glaive is about six pounds. It's not too bad. Well, this one's probably closer to ten. It's a pretty top-heavy. It's designed for a gnoll. Or at least designed for something big that wants to hurt something badly. You do manage through a collection of shinies in the pack leader's pockets and manage to find roughly 13 gold pieces, three silver and no copper. It only wants things that are shiny. Copper aren't as shiny to them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Bringing it back in, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're all real good friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No. Congratulations, Marisha.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So happy for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys, finishing this fray, you gather the gnoll ears as well as--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Rummage through their bodies.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check. The two of you who are investigating their bodies.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll give advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I did. I know. I'm doing that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. That's not good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (yelling) Did you see that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's cocked. Well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That is not cocked. I rolled a one and a two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Aw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So yeah. A three for investigation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, there's the glaive. It's hard to miss that. It's pretty well-made; it's sturdy, it has some of the spines that are part of the armor as well affixed to it along the top.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take it. How heavy is it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: The little goblin girl isn't leering at you. I mean, has been leering at you since you arrived but nothing in a way that catches your attention.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Where does Shakäste put the gold?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: I put it in my--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can do it discreetly if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Well, I suppose a blind man does put his gold in his back pocket pretty discreetly, actually. He doesn't have to look at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a stealth check. Or a sleight of hand check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Three gold for you. I've got one gold left.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'll take it.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: It's a nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Plus what's your sleight of hand skill?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Sleight of hand is plus five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So 14. Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so you have no idea. He receives the gold and the hand disappears beneath the cloak which is now covering most of his torso and you have no idea where it got put.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How much silver did you say there was?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two silver.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Do I notice her looking at me? I mean, does Anastasia notice her looking at me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean, no more than anybody looks at anybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: All right.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You're holding it and it's not close enough. I need you all to roll initiative now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Got nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Waiting to beat face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're all staying right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Should we creep forward a little? What should we do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. We're going to have to fan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I guess Fjord and I will take a good ten feet or so up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They might see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're going closer?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're getting really close to the manticore.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, maybe the other side of the tunnel so they don't see you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He's got a distance weapon anyway, there's really no such thing as a bad--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can see me doing this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Will you put Fjord towards me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, this way?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, pull him to the other side. They're seeing me do arcane bullshit on the side while sweating.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anybody else preparing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll stand next to Caleb on the inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm really, at this point, only useful for a couple things. I'm going to keep in the back there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Shakäste, anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I got my Vicious Mockery rolling.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: I would like for Anastasia to fly to the other side of the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Whereabout?

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: No those stalagmites over-- yeah, there you go. Hide in those crags over there by the-- that's it. Keep a good eye. Good girl.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (humming drone) All righty. The manticore begins to clomp up the steps.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Airborne?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, on foot at the moment like (impact sounds).

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We'll just wait for Nott. Go Nott go.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: When do I go?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, right now as the manticore crests the top of the stairs, the large, joker-like, toothy grin of the female manticore glances up right towards all of you and goes (growls).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I attack her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not within range of you yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Not within range? Then I don't do it yet.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty, that ends your turn. It's now Jester's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I move forward and end up right over there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah and end up on his flank melee, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Put you right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I will unleash the full fury of my falchion into his side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With the blade drawn--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Two-handed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. Shakäste, as you watch, the half-orc, Fjord, suddenly emerges from his hand out of nowhere, this flash of greenish-blue energy and a splash of water spatters across the ground as a slightly curved at the tip falchion appears that has a cluster of barnacles along the base of it and slowly curling up the blade and sea water dripping off of it at all times leaving a trail of liquid.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This thing is pretty big, it's not too hard to hit comparatively.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 13 points of damage. Slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll to hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The ten, two-handed. That is it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. All right that finishes your turn. It is now the manticore's go. It is going to make three attacks, a bite and two claw attacks. It's going to make two claw attacks. Actually, it's going to make one sweeping claw attack at Jester from behind and then a bite and a claw attack at you, since you're right in front of it and already struck it with your falchion.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) Should I waste my action on this shit? I'm still hidden, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As far as you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's also another dude.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Another dude? Oh, you mean the bad guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's the priest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Not another good guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah fuck. I'm going to use Message and point to one of the guards that I just untied.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're not guards, they're civilians.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Or whatever, the civilians and say to him The second after the priest casts a spell, grab your friend and run.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you deliver the message. That's as far as you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then for my movement I'm going to tuck in even tighter.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. All right that finishes your turn. It is now the manticore's go. It is going to make three attacks, a bite and two claw attacks. It's going to make two claw attacks. Actually, it's going to make one sweeping claw attack at Jester from behind and then a bite and a claw attack at you, since you're right in front of it and already struck it with your falchion.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) Should I waste my action on this shit? I'm still hidden, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As far as you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's also another dude.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Another dude? Oh, you mean the bad guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's the priest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Not another good guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah fuck. I'm going to use Message and point to one of the guards that I just untied.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're not guards, they're civilians.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Or whatever, the civilians and say to him The second after the priest casts a spell, grab your friend and run.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you deliver the message. That's as far as you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then for my movement I'm going to tuck in even tighter.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Nope, you both, (whoosh). The giant gust of wind from the wings flapping push you away and you have to block your vision to keep the dust out of the way. Finishing the manticore's turn, it is now Beau's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where's your AC?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's ten points of piercing damage from the bite to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Great, he takes another ten points of cold damage, as my Armor of--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She, thank you. As my Armor of Agathys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Interesting, in this quick series of hits, she's doing fine, but this is an unexpected burst of damage and you can see harrying's starting to show. A powerful creature can do some powerful damage, but is showing a little bit of wear and tear. With that, the manticore is going to take to the sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Take to the sky!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to fly up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we get an attack of opportunity?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You both do, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ah, I'm going to kick it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can punch it, make an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I don't hit it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What did you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a three!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do I get an attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't think that's going to hit either, that's an eight.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It looks like it would have been the size for a manticore. Since you rolled so high in investigation, you also notice that these manacles, which are open, have a single rune pressed into where they meet and lock in place, as there is no other visible locking mechanism. You are unable to really, at the moment, ascertain the nature of it. These manacles are fresh, they're clean compared to all the other stuff in here. They are there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know I'm so excited, our first loot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is so exciting!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also, tangled within the mass, you find chains but larger than normal chains. These chains are attached to a set of unlocked manacles, much larger than any human manacles you've seen. There are four identical loops, a little over one foot in diameter, all attached via this chain to one larger one about four feet in diameter.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's huge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Was it for the manticore?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You bring yourself back to the surface. The light of the day is growing closer to sunset, another hour, hour and a half or so before the sun sets, but you return to the shack, which has been untouched, unsullied since your leaving. The remainder of the survivors greet you upon you letting them know you've returned, and you watch two more reunions occur as the two individuals you had saved from the belly of the manticore find the rest of their family within the survivors. You gather the rest of the bodies, and whoever needs the travel, and begin to load up the cart you brought with you, as well as the manticore head, unless you want to carry that back to town yourself.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just over the shoulder, just walk out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You couldn't carry it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't carry it, that's how much I weigh.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Even I couldn't carry that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, you all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Later.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's time for that later.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Come on. Let's go get some sunlight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I grab Caleb, wrap an arm around him, and try to walk him out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to grab the other side, we're going to-- yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You did good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well I'm still here with this big, giant manticore head so-- you guys got Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm helping out.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: You're going through a change, my friend, and that's not a bad thing. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You guys manage to exit the mines, it seems that the remainder of the gnoll warband have either scattered or collapsed beneath the earlier tunnel falling.

preceding_turns.speaker: KHARY
preceding_turns.text: Gnoll cowards.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cowardly gnolls, cowardly gnolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You just cured me.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Eventually after night falls, you can make camp or you continue to make your way to Alfield. It's only a few miles off and you'll probably get there maybe an hour or two after sunset.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think it might be easier to put it on the cart.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can rope it onto the cart without much of an issue, though you still have a single horse pulling a lot of people and a lot of manticore head. That horse is not going to be traveling at maximum speed, it's going to be a slow pace on that thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, if it's all slow then it doesn't matter I can walk alongside it and pull the manticore head.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Making your way into the town. Since you've seen it last, a number of buildings still lay in cinders, ash, and burned structures, but the people are in the process of cleaning and rebuilding their lives from the night before where this first attack initially happened. Within a short time, the crownsguard seemed to have brought Bryce back for you. Bryce, which you have not met yet, is currently the Watchmaster of the town. You see a genderfluid half-elf with blonde shoulder-length hair and armor. They seem to be recovering from the wound they sustained the night before and as you approach they immediately come up to you with a bit of a jog and say, "My gods, you've certainly come through on my-- what is that?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably just get there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's make it all the way back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you guys make your way under the outskirts of town, back through the forest that cradles the northeast side of the city, a handful of crownsguard that are keeping watch for any sort of incursion watch you approach and immediately one of them puts up a hand, "Halt. Who goes there?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All hail, the conquering heroes!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The saviors of Alfield have returned!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Huzzah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right the, um, yes-- come this way," he seems to not be able to deal with the fact that you've arrived with all of these survivors, and the head of a manticore being pulled by this poor horse.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's two horses.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There are two horses.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: W.C and Crapper.
